# notify

```go
import "github.com/retr0h/osapi/internal/controller/notify"
```

Package notify provides a pluggable condition notification system that watches
the registry KV bucket for component condition transitions and dispatches events
via configurable notifiers.

<a name="ConditionEvent"></a>

## type [ConditionEvent](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/controller/notify/types.go#L32-L45)

ConditionEvent represents a condition state transition on a component.

```go
type ConditionEvent struct {
    // ComponentType is "agent", "api", or "nats".
    ComponentType string
    // Hostname identifies the component.
    Hostname string
    // Condition is the condition type (e.g., "MemoryPressure").
    Condition string
    // Active is true when the condition fires, false when resolved.
    Active bool
    // Reason describes why the condition triggered or resolved.
    Reason string
    // Timestamp is when the transition occurred.
    Timestamp time.Time
}
```

<a name="Notifier"></a>

## type [Notifier](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/controller/notify/types.go#L48-L50)

Notifier sends notifications when component conditions change.

```go
type Notifier interface {
    Notify(ctx context.Context, event ConditionEvent) error
}
```

<a name="Watcher"></a>

## type [Watcher](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/controller/notify/watcher.go#L45-L52)

Watcher monitors the registry KV bucket for condition transitions and emits
ConditionEvents via the configured Notifier. Active conditions are re\-notified
after the configured renotify interval.

```go
type Watcher struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="NewWatcher"></a>

### func [NewWatcher](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/controller/notify/watcher.go#L57-L62)

```go
func NewWatcher(kv jetstream.KeyValue, notifier Notifier, logger *slog.Logger, renotifyInterval time.Duration) *Watcher
```

NewWatcher creates a new Watcher that monitors registry KV entries and notifies
on condition transitions. Active conditions are re\-notified after
renotifyInterval elapses \(0 disables re\-notification\).

<a name="Watcher.Start"></a>

### func \(\*Watcher\) [Start](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/controller/notify/watcher.go#L74-L76)

```go
func (w *Watcher) Start(ctx context.Context) error
```

Start watches the registry KV for changes. Blocks until ctx is cancelled.
Returns nil when the context is cancelled, or an error if WatchAll fails.
